header (e.g. after editing a cell). Only the chevron arrow button
triggers toggle now.

design: minimal type-aware empty states for all editable cells

Replace verbose "Cliquer pour modifier..." with quiet type-specific
indicators: dash for text/number, persistent icons for date/phone/
email/location, muted User icon without text, "—" for empty selects.
Icons always visible as anchors so empty→filled transition is smooth.

refactor: replace DossierFilters with ColumnFilters on dossiers page

Extract matchesFilter to shared utility, update dossiers page to use
the same per-column filtering system as board pages. Remove old
DossierFilters component (status + date range only) in favor of
ColumnFilters (type-aware operators for all column types).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

design: add dark/light theme system with next-themes

Install next-themes, add ThemeProvider + ThemeToggle, define CSS
design tokens for both modes in globals.css, migrate ~1500 hardcoded
colors to semantic tokens across all components. Sidebar is light in
light mode, dark navy in dark mode. All color-coded elements (badges,
file types, status indicators) use dark: variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

commit.message:
test(marketplace): add 68 unit tests for pure marketplace helpers

Tests cover:
- _env_flag: all truthy/falsy values, missing env, whitespace
- _normalize_identity: None, str, int, whitespace
- _ids_equal: str/str, int/str tolerance, None/empty guards
- _idempotency_compose_key: composition, anonymous, whitespace strip
- _normalize_idempotency_key: valid, empty, too-long, invalid chars, Header obj
- _idempotency_get/_set: roundtrip, TTL expiry, LRU eviction
- _db_session_available: real mock, missing attrs, None, dict
- _to_cents/_to_dollars: rounding, zero, roundtrip
- _row_to_listing: price conversion, None handling, datetime isoformat, id normalization

fix(ci): update CI workflow for Vite build tool

Changed frontend CI pipeline from react-scripts test to Vite build:
- Removed: npm test -- --watchAll=false (react-scripts only)
- Added: npm run build (Vite production build)
- Added: Build output verification (index.html check)

Rationale:
- react-scripts removed (migrated to Vite)
- Frontend now uses E2E tests (Playwright) separate from CI
- CI should verify production build succeeds (not unit tests)
- Build verification ensures bundle is correctly generated

This aligns with new frontend architecture:
- Unit tests: Local development with Vite
- E2E tests: Separate Playwright workflow
- CI verification: Production build only

commit.message:
Initial release: Neanderthal admixture predicts mythological variation

Full manuscript, analysis scripts, figures, and results for the
computational analysis of 2,138 motifs across 926 traditions.

Three findings: admixture-mythology correlation (8.56x enrichment,
3 Bonferroni survivors), the Folk Tale Belt (18 vs 247 asymmetry),
and the 81% unexplained variance (Jaccard + Mantel).

matching X on the platform" and invites users to register for notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix hard negative mining bug that accidentally masked positive patches

The old cumsum-based approach sorted all 256 patch indices together.
Positive patches had zero neg_loss and sorted to the end, where the
cumsum threshold condition was already True — masking them out and
causing training loss=0.0000. Now operates only on negative patch
indices so positive patches are never touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify Director's Brief form from 5 steps to 2 steps

Reduced the form from 5 steps (Project, Brand, Creative, Technical, Tier) to just 2 steps
(Details + Generate). Removed all optional fields (budget, brand info, target audience,
key message, CTA, visual style, moods, references, aspect ratio, platforms, audio preference)
to streamline the user experience. The AI infers these from the creative concept.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: patch CMake configs to resolve transitive target references

Replace CMAKE_PROJECT_INCLUDE approach (which doesn't work in
try_compile sub-projects) with direct sed patching of installed
CMake config files.  After installing libtiff and Leptonica,
replace target references (ZLIB::ZLIB, JPEG::JPEG, CMath::CMath,
TIFF::TIFF) with plain library flags (-lz, -ljpeg, -lm, -ltiff).
This ensures all downstream consumers, including try_compile()
in Tesseract's CheckFunctions.cmake, can resolve dependencies.

commit.message:
Cut Vercel image optimization usage: 30-day cache TTL + proper sizes props

Two changes that together should reduce transformations by ~95%:

1. minimumCacheTTL: 2592000 (30 days) in next.config.ts — previously
   using Vercel's default (~60s), so every unique artist/album image was
   being re-transformed thousands of times per day as cache expired.

2. sizes prop added to every <Image fill> in the app — without this,
   Next.js generates up to 9 size variants per image (320w through 3840w).
   Now each image only generates the variant matching its actual rendered
   size (e.g. "32px" for sidebar thumbnails, "25vw" for grid cards).

commit.message:
Fix duplicate match_date: reuse existing instead of failing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: derive MACHINE_CATEGORIES from category-mapping to prevent drift

MACHINE_CATEGORIES in defaults.ts was independently maintained from the
MachineCategory type and the depreciation mappings, meaning they could
silently diverge. Now MACHINE_CATEGORIES is derived from CATEGORY_LABELS
in category-mapping.ts, which is a Record<ReplacementCategory, string> —
TypeScript enforces that every category has a label, and the replacement
planner dropdown automatically stays in sync.

commit.message:
Fix Playwright deadlock and move browser install to app startup

- _ensure_browser_installed: replace capture_output=True (deadlocks
  when playwright install writes 150MB of progress) with DEVNULL +
  5-min timeout; rename to ensure_browser_installed (public)
- _start: check browser is ready before launching; raise clear error
  if not so sync surfaces the real problem instead of a timeout
- app.py: call ensure_browser_installed() at startup so Chromium is
  cached before Sync Now is ever pressed

commit.message:
Fix training ignoring YAML config for epochs and learning rate

CLI argparse defaults (epochs=100, lr=1e-4) were always overriding
the YAML config values (epochs=150, lr=0.001). Now CLI args default
to None and fall through to YAML config values when not explicitly
provided on the command line.

This caused QPAS training to plateau — the model trained with 10x
too low a learning rate (0.0001 vs configured 0.001).

commit.message:
Fix hover glitch on feature cards in section 3

Feature cards (0-2) used morph-based positioning with translateX offset,
but hover logic reset tx=0 causing them to snap back. Now hover push-aside
only activates for non-feature cards (baseIdx >= 3) and feature cards get
pointer-events-none when horizontally scrolled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(parity): travel-end movemon via savedRun guard in multi-repeat loop

When travel ends (findtravelpath exhausts the path), JS's end_running()
clears ctx.run to 0 inside domove_core. The multi-repeat loop's check
for `ctx.run === 8` then fails, skipping the final advanceTimedTurn
that C's moveloop would run.

In C, when travel ends via the u_at() path in domove() (dx=dy=0),
context.move is NOT cleared — it stays 1 from the prior successful
domove. So the next moveloop_core iteration runs movemon one more time
before discovering multi=0 and exiting to rhack.

Fix: save ctx.run before calling domove, and use savedRun === 8 as the
condition for the extra advanceTimedTurn. This ensures the final movemon
runs even after end_running clears ctx.run.

Result: seed033 RNG divergence moved from step 470 index 6640 to
step 935 index 10774 (43% → 69% matching RNG calls). The remaining
divergence at step 935 is caused by a separate issue (dowhatdoes 'y'
screen mismatch at step 693 affecting cursor positions).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Block circular reasoning: forbid testing pre-selected genes via execute_code

artificially significant p-values and false CONFIRMED hypotheses.

Fix Create Video → wizard by switching from localStorage to router state

The pageKey animation system in App.jsx remounts the page div on every
navigation, causing VideoMarketingPage to mount twice. The second mount
would read empty localStorage (already cleared by the first) and reset
wizardImage to null.

Fix: pass the creative import as React Router navigation state instead of
localStorage. Router state lives in the location context and is stable
across the pageKey remount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Sea-ice and Lead Classification pipeline

Complete MLOps pipeline for classifying Sentinel-3 OLCI patches as
sea_ice (0) or lead (1) using six classifier families.

Pipeline components:
- ETL: extract.py (CDSE OAuth2), transform.py (.SEN3 -> TOA BRF chunks),
  load.py (IRIS mask patches -> ml_dataset.npz)
- Models: CNN, ViT, MLP (Keras) + RF, PolySVM, GP (sklearn), all tracked
  in MLflow with @champion alias promotion
- Evaluation: per-class F1, AUC-ROC/PR, confusion matrix (count + %)
- Diagnostics: 12 diagnostic plots (training curves, OOB, calibration, etc.)
- Visualisation: spatial classification map
- Serving: FastAPI with JSON batch + image upload (.npy -> PNG spatial map)
- Containerisation: multi-stage Dockerfile (train/serve), docker-compose,
  Singularity/Apptainer .def for UCL Kathleen HPC
- Orchestration: Airflow DAG (6 parallel train + predict tasks) + SLURM
  scripts (singlenode, 36 CPUs, 5h30m)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- vymeriavaci-zaklad-sp-sk: full rewrite — calls computeVymeriavaciZakladSpSk, ROUND(MIN(MAX(B5,914.40),1397),2), statutory 914.40/1397 constants, IF for obmedzenie flags

commit.message:
feat: persist prediction history to SQLite (predictions.db)

Every deploy run now records all predictions into a local SQLite DB:
- model/history.py: record_predictions(), backfill_outcomes(),
  load_history(), accuracy_summary()
- deploy.py: calls record_predictions() and backfill_outcomes()
  after each predict step; stages predictions.db alongside index.html
- render_html.py: _history_html() renders a 60-day rolling accuracy
  dot-grid (TP=green ■, TN=green ■, FP=orange □, FN=blue □,
  pending=grey ·) with precision/recall/accuracy summary
- forecast.yml: adds predictions.db to the Actions cache path

No external server needed — SQLite file lives in the repo and
accumulates across GitHub Actions runs via the cache.

route through the VM's ops interface via wg-quick/openvpn/mullvad.

commit.message:
Lift small character models up so head aligns near eye level

eye height and model height, so their head sits near camera level
instead of at the player's feet. Skeleton (1.75) is unaffected.
